_comment: Canonical sha256 per release version. Once a version is published, its sha256 is immutable here. make-release-tarball.sh compares the freshly-built sha against this; if they differ, it fails with 'bump pkgver'. This prevents the scenario where CI silently updates AUR's sha256 while old users' makepkg caches still hold the old tarball.

147.0.7727.55.1.notes: Patch: Zeed-purple input/button palette. Binary unchanged.

147.0.7727.55.6.notes: Auto mode = agent loop with tools (removes classifyIntent mis-routing); Tasks pane wired (add/toggle/delete + agent add_task tool); Context Map fallback when LLM fails; memory list refresh after async fact extraction

147.0.7727.55.7.notes: P2 #15/#16/#18/#19/#20: Tasks full (priority/due/reminder/tabgroup); Bookmarks pane (memo required + agent bookmark_page tool); RSS feed ingestion via new Mojo FetchUrl (+ parser for RSS 2.0/Atom 1.0); desktop notifications fire for due reminders (Notification API); Recommendations (top-3 related marks/feed items) on Chat pane. Skips #17 (Mobile).

147.0.7727.55.8.notes: Data integration pass (Gaps 1-7): RSS/Bookmark auto-flow into Memory with origin tag; Context Map adds mark/feed lanes (4 sources, color-coded); Recommendations include memory-origin facts; TabGroup auto-stamp on new tasks/bookmarks/facts + scope toggle on crumb; Agent read tools (search_memory/list_tasks/list_bookmarks/list_feeds); Reminder edit UI (⏰ button per task). Stores are now genuinely interconnected — one data flywheel, not four silos.

147.0.7727.55.9.notes: Quick Action bar (6 buttons: Like/Bookmark/Task/Remind/Feed/Related act on current tab) + comprehensive Debug pane (store stats + dump to console + per-store reset + reset ALL) + [Zeed:*] console logging (enable via localStorage.zeed_debug='1'). Adds clear() methods to all stores for clean reset. Agent loop now logs every step incl. tool execution so stops/errors are diagnosable in DevTools. Feed sniff from page <link rel="alternate" type="rss|atom">.

147.0.7727.55.10.notes: Keyboard shortcuts: Ctrl+Shift+S summarize current page, Ctrl+Shift+T translate current page, Ctrl/Alt+1/2/3 open Nth recommendation. @ alias popup in Chat input (type @ at start of word) with @tab (title+URL), @selection (highlighted text), @page (body summary). Each pastes a fenced block the LLM can parse.

147.0.7727.55.11.notes: CRITICAL FIX: replace ALL innerHTML assignments (16 call sites) with Trusted-Types-safe DOM APIs (replaceChildren + createElement + textContent). chrome:// WebUIs enforce Trusted Types and blocked every innerHTML write — that's why Memory/Map/Tasks/Feeds/Marks panes were stuck on their initial 'ハリボテ' HTML and the Agent loop stopped mid-iteration when any tool handler triggered a re-render. Panes now actually render, Agent loop runs to completion.

147.0.7727.55.12.notes: CRITICAL FIX: crash on sidebar open. .11 unblocked the render paths, which meant refreshContextMap → getPageContent was actually reached, which called RenderFrameHost::ExecuteJavaScript on whatever active tab the user had. If the active tab was chrome:// (new tab / settings / devtools / zeed-sidebar itself), CanExecuteJavaScript() CHECK-failed and crashed the whole browser process. Added IsScriptableUrl() guard in GetPageContent + ExecuteScript: only http(s)/file proceed; chrome://, data:, about:, devtools:// return a soft placeholder without triggering the CHECK.

147.0.7727.55.13.notes: fix: pipe-closed (Agent/getTabs), Tasks inline form, bookmark line icons

147.0.7727.55.14.notes: fix: CHECK crash on GetPageContent — add frame-level WebUI/bindings guard

147.0.7727.55.15.notes: fix: use ExecuteJavaScriptInIsolatedWorld (CHECK-safe) + rename binary chrome->zeed

147.0.7727.55.16.notes: CRITICAL: actually ship ExecuteJavaScriptInIsolatedWorld fix (prior releases compiled pre-fix due to missing chromium_src sync)
